_comment: QuietMonitor Security Suite - Settings Configuration v2.0. Protect this file - it contains sensitive credentials.
_migration: If upgrading from v1.0, new sections are auto-appended on first run. Review all new sections below.

SMTP._comment: Configure your SMTP relay. Leave Username/Password empty for relay servers that don't require auth.
SMTP._passwordNote: Store password as Windows DPAPI encrypted string: Read-Host -AsSecureString | ConvertFrom-SecureString

Webhook._authNote: Optional Bearer token or API key header value

quarantine._passwordNote: Password used to derive AES-256 key for quarantine encryption (PBKDF2/SHA256, 100000 iterations)
quarantine._workflowComment: Interactive quarantine workflow for suspicious services and processes. Remove paths from knownSafePaths to increase sensitivity.

weeklyReport._comment: Scheduled weekly summary report. Runs via Windows Task Scheduler (created by Install-QuietMonitor.ps1).

baseline._comment: System baseline capture. Run option [10] to rebuild baseline. First run auto-creates baseline.json.

threatIntel._comment: Threat intelligence feeds. All APIs are optional - suite works fully offline without keys.

abuseIPDB._note: Free tier: 1000 checks/day. Register at https://www.abuseipdb.com/api

virusTotal._note: Free tier: 4 requests/min. Register at https://www.virustotal.com/gui/my-apikey

malwareBazaar._note: Free API - no key required. Checks process hashes against known malware database.

threatIntel._urlhausNote: Download from https://urlhaus.abuse.ch/downloads/text/ and save to above path

uba._comment: User Behavior Analytics. Analyzes Security event logs for anomalous patterns. MITRE: T1078, T1110.

ransomwareGuard._comment: Real-time ransomware detection via FileSystemWatcher. MITRE: T1486, T1490.

vulnerability._comment: Vulnerability management. Download NVD CVE feed from https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/data-feeds

selfProtect._comment: Anti-tamper protection. Monitors integrity of QuietMonitor's own PS1 files. MITRE: T1562.
